member.name: T:SmartInventoryAPI.Models.DTOs.Response.PaginatedResponseDto`1
member.summary: Generic paginated response DTO that wraps data with pagination metadata

member.name: P:SmartInventoryAPI.Models.DTOs.Response.PaginatedResponseDto`1.Data
member.summary: The actual data items for the current page

member.name: P:SmartInventoryAPI.Models.DTOs.Response.PaginatedResponseDto`1.Total
member.summary: Total number of items in the database (excluding deleted items)

member.name: P:SmartInventoryAPI.Models.DTOs.Response.PaginatedResponseDto`1.HasNextPage
member.summary: Whether there are more pages after the current one

member.name: P:SmartInventoryAPI.Models.DTOs.Response.PaginatedResponseDto`1.HasPreviousPage
member.summary: Whether there are pages before the current one
